properties.name: app.jwt.secret
properties.description: HMAC signing secret for JWTs. Must be at least 256 bits.

properties.name: app.frontend.url
properties.description: Base URL of the frontend app (used for OAuth2 redirects, CORS, etc.).

properties.name: app.role.admin-code
properties.description: Shared code required to self-register as ADMIN.

properties.name: app.role.technician-code
properties.description: Shared code required to self-register as TECHNICIAN.

properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of origins allowed by CORS.

properties.name: app.upload.dir
properties.description: Filesystem directory where ticket attachments are stored.

properties.name: app.base-url
properties.description: Public base URL of this backend (used to build absolute links).
